name: Product 360
description: Product 360° turntable / multi-angle reveal — 8-15s of photorealistic product rotation with dramatic lighting, hero-angle lock, macro detail progression, and final logo/CTA. 9:16 (TikTok / Reels / Shorts) or 1:1 (IG feed / Amazon). No VO by default — music + product foley + optional spec overlays carry the spot. Reference-required: a real product photo / packaging / logo MUST be supplied; AI-improvised packaging on a branded product never reads as real. The standard e-commerce conversion clip — works for jewelry, watches, electronics, cosmetics, footwear, fashion accessories, beverages.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter, multi-ref WITH user-supplied product photo (required for every frame the product is visible). Generate 2-4 angle keyframes (hero, profile, back, macro detail) — i2v interpolates rotation between them.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter, 5s clips with smooth orbital / turntable motion prompts ('slow 360 turntable rotation, locked center, no camera shake'). generate_audio: false.
stackSummary.voiceover: None by default. Optional 1-line ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 tag at finale ('From $199', product name) only if user explicitly asks.
stackSummary.captions: Spec / feature overlays only — rendered in Remotion (not Whisper). Bottom-third, fade-in 2s after start, fade-out 1s before end. Examples: product name → key feature → price/CTA.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single track matched to product category. Luxury (jewelry, watches): cinematic strings + sonic chime at finale. Tech: ambient electronic pulse. Beauty: soft piano / harp. Athletic / automotive: tight modern percussion.

constants.structure: 2s hook → 3-7s rotation → 2-4s macro detail → 1-2s finale (logo + CTA)
constants.cameraMotion: locked-center turntable OR slow orbital — never both

variationAxes: product category (jewelry, watch, electronics, cosmetics, footwear, fashion accessory, beverage, home good, automotive)
hook style (spotlight snap, particle materialize, crash & shockwave, peel reveal, macro-to-wide pull, halo flare, slow lift, half-spin reveal)
rotation pattern (slow 360 turntable, fast spin, half-rotation, pendulum swing, orbital camera around static product, overhead spin)
lighting setup (dramatic single key + rim for luxury, soft diffuse for beauty, cool clinical for tech, warm graze for leather)
background (seamless white, seamless black, gradient neutral, marble / stone, reflective surface, lifestyle context)
aspect (9:16 vertical for social, 1:1 square for IG / Amazon, 16:9 for product page)
doNotCopyLiterally: Specific rotation timings, exact lighting K-temps, prompt phrasings. Vibe reference only — adapt to the product category and the user-supplied product reference.
referenceNotes: Product reference (photo, packaging, logo) is REQUIRED. The reference-required gate (AGENTS.md hard rule #3) refuses generation if no reference exists at workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/. AI-improvised packaging on a branded product is never acceptable — it always reads as fake. Multi-angle uploads (3 / 5 / 7 / 9 images) unlock comprehensive 360 strategies — see TEMPLATE.md Required Inputs.
